channel.title: recent
channel.description: I write about how I use python and linux in data science.

item.title: Price An Stl Print On Slant3D
item.description: I I You will need an api key from the slant api, which currently requires a google Then you can run the python script to price out your print. I
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: 💭 Statically Makes Og Images **Easy** (2048×1170)
item.description:
Staically makes creating OG images so easy, you can just pop this in your <head> section with some og tags.
``` html
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: 💭 E576: Error While Reading Shada File: There Is An Item At Position 270498 That Must Not Be There: Missing Itemsare For Internal Uses Only · Issue #6875 · Neovim/Neovim
item.description: I hit an interesting error after updating my nvim plugins today. I'm sti not even quite sure what a ShaDa file is, but
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: 💭 Production-Ready Python Docker Containers With Uv
item.description: Hynek has a sick dockerfile setup for using uv in python projects.
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: 💭 Proper Handling Of None In Where Condition · Issue #109 · Fastapi/Sqlmodel · Github
item.description: SQLModel models ship with an `is_`, and `is_not` that you can use to compare to None without pesky linters complaining.
item.author: Waylon Walker
